code:
export const DUMMY_TEAM = [{
  id: 't1',
  name: 'Dr. Meera Nair',
  role: 'Founder & Chief Lepidopterist',
  dept: 'Research',
  initials: 'MN',
  color: '#4ade80',
  experience: 20,
  publications: 47,
  fieldTrips: 180,
  species_described: 3,
  bio: "Pioneer in butterfly migration research across South Asia. PhD from IISc Bangalore. Has led expeditions in 28 Indian states and described 3 new species. Fellow of the Indian Academy of Sciences.",
  education: 'PhD Entomology, IISc Bangalore',
  specialization: 'Migration Ecology, Population Genetics',
  awards: ['BNHS Gold Medal 2019', 'MoEFCC Conservation Award 2021', 'Sanctuary Asia Green Oscar 2023'],
  social: {
    twitter: 'https://twitter.com',
    researchgate: 'https://researchgate.net',
    email: 'meera@butterfly.in',
    instagram: 'https://instagram.com'
  }
}, {
  id: 't2',
  name: 'Arjun Krishnamurthy',
  role: 'Senior Field Researcher',
  dept: 'Research',
  initials: 'AK',
  color: '#60a5fa',
  experience: 12,
  publications: 18,
  fieldTrips: 210,
  species_described: 1,
  bio: 'Wildlife photographer turned field researcher. His documentation work has appeared in Nature India, Sanctuary Asia, and BBC Wildlife. Specialist in high-altitude Himalayan species.',
  education: 'MSc Wildlife Biology, WII Dehradun',
  specialization: 'Behavioral Ecology, Photography',
  awards: ['Wildlife Photographer of Year 2020', 'BNHS Young Naturalist 2018'],
  social: {
    twitter: 'https://twitter.com',
    instagram: 'https://instagram.com',
    email: 'arjun@butterfly.in'
  }
}, {
  id: 't3',
  name: 'Priya Sharma',
  role: 'Data Science Lead',
  dept: 'Technology',
  initials: 'PS',
  color: '#f472b6',
  experience: 8,
  publications: 12,
  fieldTrips: 45,
  species_described: 0,
  bio: 'Builds AI/ML models to predict butterfly habitat suitability from climate and remote sensing data. Created the first deep learning species ID system for Indian butterflies.',
  education: 'BTech CS IIT Bombay; MSc Bioinformatics TIFR',
  specialization: 'Machine Learning, Climate Modelling, Remote Sensing',
  awards: ['DST Women in Science 2022', 'iNaturalist Top Identifier 2023'],
  social: {
    github: 'https://github.com',
    linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com',
    email: 'priya@butterfly.in'
  }
}, {
  id: 't4',
  name: 'Ravi Sundar',
  role: 'Community Science Lead',
  dept: 'Outreach',
  initials: 'RS',
  color: '#fb923c',
  experience: 9,
  publications: 6,
  fieldTrips: 80,
  species_described: 0,
  bio: "Manages a network of 4,200+ citizen scientists. Designed the mobile observation protocol used by schools across India. Organizes annual Butterfly Week — India's largest public survey.",
  education: 'MA Environmental Studies, JNU Delhi',
  specialization: 'Citizen Science, Conservation Education',
  awards: ['UN Young Champion of Earth 2021'],
  social: {
    twitter: 'https://twitter.com',
    email: 'ravi@butterfly.in'
  }
}, {
  id: 't5',
  name: 'Lakshmi Iyer',
  role: 'Conservation Policy Lead',
  dept: 'Conservation',
  initials: 'LI',
  color: '#a78bfa',
  experience: 14,
  publications: 9,
  fieldTrips: 60,
  species_described: 0,
  bio: 'Has successfully lobbied for three butterfly corridor notifications under the Indian Forest Act. Advises MoEFCC on pollinator protection. Former IUCN SSC Lepidoptera Specialist Group member.',
  education: 'LLB Environmental Law, NLS Bangalore; MSc Conservation',
  specialization: 'Environmental Law, Protected Areas, Policy',
  awards: ['IUCN Outstanding Service Award 2020'],
  social: {
    linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com',
    email: 'lakshmi@butterfly.in'
  }
}, {
  id: 't6',
  name: 'Dr. Vikram Pillai',
  role: 'Taxonomist & Systematist',
  dept: 'Research',
  initials: 'VP',
  color: '#34d399',
  experience: 18,
  publications: 63,
  fieldTrips: 120,
  species_described: 7,
  bio: 'Specialist in Papilionidae systematics using molecular phylogenetics. Co-authored the authoritative Checklist of Indian Butterflies with 1,547 verified species.',
  education: 'PhD Zoology, University of Kerala',
  specialization: 'Molecular Systematics, Phylogenetics, Taxonomy',
  awards: ['BNHS Gold Medal 2017', 'DST SERB National Science Chair 2023'],
  social: {
    researchgate: 'https://researchgate.net',
    email: 'vikram@butterfly.in'
  }
}];

export const DUMMY_TEAM = [
  { id: 't1', name: 'Dr. Meera Nair', role: 'Founder & Chief Lepidopterist', dept: 'Research', initials: 'MN', color: '#4ade80', experience: 20, publications: 47, fieldTrips: 180, species_described: 3, bio: "Pioneer in butterfly migration research across South Asia. PhD from IISc Bangalore. Has led expeditions in 28 Indian states and described 3 new species. Fellow of the Indian Academy of Sciences.", education: 'PhD Entomology, IISc Bangalore', specialization: 'Migration Ecology, Population Genetics', awards: ['BNHS Gold Medal 2019', 'MoEFCC Conservation Award 2021', 'Sanctuary Asia Green Oscar 2023'], social: { twitter: 'https://twitter.com', researchgate: 'https://researchgate.net', email: 'meera@butterfly.in', instagram: 'https://instagram.com' } },
  { id: 't2', name: 'Arjun Krishnamurthy', role: 'Senior Field Researcher', dept: 'Research', initials: 'AK', color: '#60a5fa', experience: 12, publications: 18, fieldTrips: 210, species_described: 1, bio: 'Wildlife photographer turned field researcher. His documentation work has appeared in Nature India, Sanctuary Asia, and BBC Wildlife. Specialist in high-altitude Himalayan species.', education: 'MSc Wildlife Biology, WII Dehradun', specialization: 'Behavioral Ecology, Photography', awards: ['Wildlife Photographer of Year 2020', 'BNHS Young Naturalist 2018'], social: { twitter: 'https://twitter.com', instagram: 'https://instagram.com', email: 'arjun@butterfly.in' } },
  { id: 't3', name: 'Priya Sharma', role: 'Data Science Lead', dept: 'Technology', initials: 'PS', color: '#f472b6', experience: 8, publications: 12, fieldTrips: 45, species_described: 0, bio: 'Builds AI/ML models to predict butterfly habitat suitability from climate and remote sensing data. Created the first deep learning species ID system for Indian butterflies.', education: 'BTech CS IIT Bombay; MSc Bioinformatics TIFR', specialization: 'Machine Learning, Climate Modelling, Remote Sensing', awards: ['DST Women in Science 2022', 'iNaturalist Top Identifier 2023'], social: { github: 'https://github.com', linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com', email: 'priya@butterfly.in' } },
  { id: 't4', name: 'Ravi Sundar', role: 'Community Science Lead', dept: 'Outreach', initials: 'RS', color: '#fb923c', experience: 9, publications: 6, fieldTrips: 80, species_described: 0, bio: "Manages a network of 4,200+ citizen scientists. Designed the mobile observation protocol used by schools across India. Organizes annual Butterfly Week — India's largest public survey.", education: 'MA Environmental Studies, JNU Delhi', specialization: 'Citizen Science, Conservation Education', awards: ['UN Young Champion of Earth 2021'], social: { twitter: 'https://twitter.com', email: 'ravi@butterfly.in' } },
  { id: 't5', name: 'Lakshmi Iyer', role: 'Conservation Policy Lead', dept: 'Conservation', initials: 'LI', color: '#a78bfa', experience: 14, publications: 9, fieldTrips: 60, species_described: 0, bio: 'Has successfully lobbied for three butterfly corridor notifications under the Indian Forest Act. Advises MoEFCC on pollinator protection. Former IUCN SSC Lepidoptera Specialist Group member.', education: 'LLB Environmental Law, NLS Bangalore; MSc Conservation', specialization: 'Environmental Law, Protected Areas, Policy', awards: ['IUCN Outstanding Service Award 2020'], social: { linkedin: 'https://linkedin.com', email: 'lakshmi@butterfly.in' } },
  { id: 't6', name: 'Dr. Vikram Pillai', role: 'Taxonomist & Systematist', dept: 'Research', initials: 'VP', color: '#34d399', experience: 18, publications: 63, fieldTrips: 120, species_described: 7, bio: 'Specialist in Papilionidae systematics using molecular phylogenetics. Co-authored the authoritative Checklist of Indian Butterflies with 1,547 verified species.', education: 'PhD Zoology, University of Kerala', specialization: 'Molecular Systematics, Phylogenetics, Taxonomy', awards: ['BNHS Gold Medal 2017', 'DST SERB National Science Chair 2023'], social: { researchgate: 'https://researchgate.net', email: 'vikram@butterfly.in' } },
];
